latin: Edwardus et Alphonsus matrem mortuam revocare conati sunt per alchemiam. sed lex commutationis crudelis fuit: Edwardus brachium et crus perdidit, Alphonsus totum corpus. nunc in armatura vacua vivit.

questions.prompt: What did the brothers try to do?

translation: Edward and Alphonse tried to revive their dead mother through alchemy. But the law of exchange was cruel: Edward lost an arm and a leg, Alphonse his entire body. Now he lives in an empty suit of armor.
